findings.summary: Cherry-pick conflicts from parallel worktree agents editing same file (lr_combiner.py). 3/4 conflicted, manual resolution slower than sequential.
findings.evidence: git cherry-pick c218e10 CONFLICT, git cherry-pick f3b1a98 CONFLICT
findings.proposed_fix: Rule: parallel worktree agents must touch disjoint files. If overlap, run sequentially or consolidate into one agent.

findings.summary: git stash pop failed because concurrent agent modified working tree (modal_prs_percentile.py).
findings.evidence: git stash pop error: local changes would be overwritten
findings.proposed_fix: Awareness only. OTHER ACTIVE AGENTS can pollute working tree.

findings.summary: Read lr_combiner.py 7x triggering dup-read hook. Most reads were for targeted line ranges after context compaction.
findings.proposed_fix: Use Grep -n -C for targeted lookups after first full read of large files.
